About the Role

As a Senior Quality Engineer you'll own and grow the quality of Tellent HR. You'll drive our test automation strategy, expand end-to-end coverage in Playwright, and raise the bar for backend testing.

What You Bring

  • Communication: Fluent English and Polish for daily collaboration.

ABOUT THE ROLE

Extract and analyse data from multiple large-scale data warehouses. Develop dashboards and reporting to generate commercial insights.

ABOUT YOU

Proficiency in SQL and experience with Looker (or similar BI tools such as Tableau, Power BI). AI-first mindset with a strong curiosity for emerging AI technologies and applications.
